name: Caraway Puffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter, cottage cheese and sugar until smooth.
2. Add grated lemon peel, caraway seed and egg to the mixture. Beat with a mixer until well combined.
3. Stir in biscuit mix and milk alternately, being careful not to overmix.
4. Spoon batter into greased muffin pans, filling each about 2/3 full.
5. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
